title: [Bug]: In `WHERE` clause, `ROUND`ing a  `decimal` type parameter produces unexpected results
description: master分支版本，`ROUND` `decimal`类型的表达式出现在`WHERE`子句中产生预期之外的结果
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2), description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10.50, 'Test 1'), (2, 20.75, 'Test 2'), (3, NULL, 'Test 3');
SELECT id, ROUND(value, 1) AS rounded_value FROM test_table WHERE ROUND(value, 1) IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET value = ROUND(value, 0) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, ROUND(COALESCE(value, 0), 1) AS rounded_value FROM test_table WHERE ROUND(COALESCE(value, 0), 1) = 0;
key_bug_features: ROUNDing decimal type in WHERE clause produces unexpected results
